process.title: How It Works
process.subtitle: We guide you every step of the way

step1.title: Apply Online
step1.desc: Fill out our simple application form with your details and documents.

step2.title: Document Review
step2.desc: Our team reviews your application and verifies all documents.

step3.title: Job Matching
step3.desc: We match you with the perfect employer based on your skills.

step4.title: Training
step4.desc: Pre-departure orientation and language training provided.

step5.title: Visa Processing
step5.desc: We handle all visa and travel document processing for you.

step6.title: Departure
step6.desc: Travel with confidence knowing support awaits on arrival.

about.title: About Luluat Alsharq
about.subtitle: A licensed, trusted, and experienced foreign employment agency
about.description: Luluat Alsharq Foreign Employment Agent PLC has been connecting Ethiopian workers with international opportunities since 2015. Licensed by the Addis Ababa City Administration Trade Bureau, we operate with full legal compliance and deep commitment to worker welfare.
about.mission: To provide safe, legal, and dignified employment opportunities to Ethiopian workers while building lasting partnerships with trusted employers worldwide.
about.vision: To be Ethiopia's most trusted and transparent foreign employment agency, empowering thousands of families through international employment.
about.license_desc: Fully licensed under Ethiopian law — Registration No. NL/AA/2/0029419/2015
